constraints.description: Headliner bands 1, 2, and 3 must each play on a different stage to ensure all stages are used
constraints.label: Headliners on different stages
constraints.name: headliner_spread

constraints.description: Stage 1 crowd cannot exceed 2000 (small venue capacity)
constraints.label: Stage 1 capacity limit
constraints.name: capacity_stage_1

constraints.description: Stage 2 crowd cannot exceed 3000 (medium venue capacity)
constraints.label: Stage 2 capacity limit
constraints.name: capacity_stage_2

constraints.description: Stage 3 crowd cannot exceed 5000 (large venue capacity)
constraints.label: Stage 3 capacity limit
constraints.name: capacity_stage_3

constraints.description: Stage 1 must have at least 500 crowd for any assigned bands
constraints.label: Stage 1 minimum crowd
constraints.name: min_crowd_1

constraints.description: Stage 2 must have at least 500 crowd for any assigned bands
constraints.label: Stage 2 minimum crowd
constraints.name: min_crowd_2

constraints.description: Stage 3 must have at least 500 crowd for headliner draw
constraints.label: Stage 3 minimum crowd
constraints.name: min_crowd_3

constraints.description: Stage 1 crowd must not exceed stage 2 crowd by more than 1500 (crowd migration safety)
constraints.label: Stage 1-2 crowd balance
constraints.name: noise_limit_1_2

constraints.description: Stage 2 crowd must not exceed stage 3 crowd by more than 1500 (crowd migration safety)
constraints.label: Stage 2-3 crowd balance
constraints.name: noise_limit_2_3

description: Assign 5 bands to 3 festival stages using BN-predicted crowd sizes to maximize total audience enjoyment while respecting venue capacity and noise constraints.
name: Festival Band-to-Stage Assignment

objectives.label: Maximize main stage crowd as primary enjoyment metric
objectives.name: maximize_total_enjoyment

additional_constraints.description: If it starts raining, stage 1 capacity drops to 1400
additional_constraints.label: Rain-reduced stage 1
additional_constraints.name: rain_stage_1

additional_constraints.description: If it starts raining, stage 2 capacity drops to 2100
additional_constraints.label: Rain-reduced stage 2
additional_constraints.name: rain_stage_2

additional_constraints.description: If it starts raining, stage 3 capacity drops to 3500
additional_constraints.label: Rain-reduced stage 3
additional_constraints.name: rain_stage_3

what_if_scenarios.description: Simulate sudden rain reducing all stage capacities by 30%. Evaluate how band assignments and crowd distributions change under weather degradation.
what_if_scenarios.name: Sudden Rain Scenario
